title: phyllanthus ligustrifolius
intro: Phyllanthus ligustrifolius, also known as the 'Malaysian liverwort', is a type of plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and liver-protective effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus ligustrifolius are said to include the treatment of liver and kidney diseases, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus ligustrifolius often involve the leaves and roots being dried and processed into capsules, teas, or infusions for consumption.
